Bug / Task Description: pruneSince in bco-core/ratelimit.go compacts a timestamp slice to the entries still inside the rolling window; it is the shared core of the rate limiters. A timestamp landing exactly on the window cutoff is currently kept as still inside the window, so the oldest sample is retained one tick too long, shifting every rolling-window rate decision by one boundary event and inflating effective counts at second/minute boundaries.
Commit Subject: fix(ratelimit): rolling-window prune cutoff is exclusive
